idePanel-collapse,
#jp-right-stack .jp-SidePanel-collapse {
  display: flex;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

#jp-left-stack .jp-SidePanel-collapse {
  justify-content: right;
}

#jp-right-stack .jp-SidePanel-collapse {
  justify-content: left;
}

#jp-left-stack .lm-StackedPanel,
#jp-right-stack .lm-StackedPanel {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
}
